Skill Palaver

Advanced Skilling Domains

Beyond foundational certifications, Skill Palaver is the mentor-led advanced skilling track — open to students across all branches (CSE-allied & Non-CSE). 14 specialised domains, 4,197 students and 64 mentors, built on real capstone projects, hackathons, full-stack Java development and competitive coding.

14
Skilling Domains
4,197
Students Enrolled
64
Faculty Mentors
₹8.5
Top Package (LPA)
🧱
Full-Stack Development (Java)
End-to-end Java web apps — Java back-end, REST APIs, MongoDB & Red Hat EAP, modern front-end.
🏆
Competitive Coding
Active on CodeChef & LeetCode with above-average ratings — strong DSA & problem-solving.
🚀
Capstone Projects
Industry-grade, mentor-guided Skill Palaver capstones solving real-world problem statements.
⚡
Hackathons
Team innovation under pressure — rapid prototyping at national & campus hackathons.
🤖₹8.5–22 LPA

Career Outcomes

Salary Packages — Minimum to Maximum

A flagship minimum of ₹8.5 LPA with maximums up to ₹22 LPA — for students across all branches (CSE-allied & Non-CSE), uplifted by full-stack Java, competitive coding (CodeChef / LeetCode) and capstone & hackathon experience. Each bar shows the ₹ range on a 0–₹22 LPA scale.

₹8.5 LPA
Minimum package (all domains)
₹22 LPA
Maximum package (AI / ML, top performers)

Figures are indicative market ranges reflecting the Skill Palaver advantage (advanced domain training + full-stack Java + competitive coding + capstones/hackathons); they are not drawn from the result files. Actual packages vary with skills, internships, role and recruiter, and rise further with experience.

Skill Development Division — KL University
14 global certifications • 11 providers • 704 certified (547 CRT / 157 Non-CRT) across 3 departments
Skill Palaver: 14 advanced domains • 4,197 students • 64 mentors • packages to ₹8.5 LPA
